theme.vibe: Boutique pediatric clinic, professional, warm, trustworthy, organized

typography.guidelines: Use Outfit for all dashboard titles and card headers to give a boutique feel. Use Manrope for all data tables, input fields, and numbers for maximum legibility.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inputs and small buttons, rounded-full for badges

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-[#EBE8E3] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surfaces.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#EBE8E3] sticky top-0 z-40
surfaces.badges: bg-[#F2E4DF] text-[#C97D63] border border-[#E8CFC1] px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

buttons.primary: bg-[#C97D63] text-white hover:bg-[#B36B53] shadow-sm rounded-xl px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2E4DF] text-[#C97D63] hover:bg-[#E8CFC1] rounded-xl px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#EBE8E3] text-[#2D2825] hover:border-[#C97D63] hover:text-[#C97D63] rounded-xl px-4 py-2

tables.header: bg-[#FDFDF9] border-y border-[#EBE8E3] text-left text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-[#7A726D] py-3 px-4

forms.input: bg-white border border-[#EBE8E3] rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[#2D2825] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E8CFC1] focus:border-[#C97D63]
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-[#2D2825] mb-1.5

icons.guidelines: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a delicate, boutique feel. Primary color for active states, secondary text color for inactive.

media.logo_instructions: Create a typographic logo using 'Outfit' font. 'Dra.' in bold text_primary, 'Brinquinho' in primary color (#C97D63). Add a Lucide 'Sparkles' icon next to it.
media.placeholders: Use subtle background patterns (like very faint topographic or noise textures) only in empty states or login screens, at max 2% opacity.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='sidebar-nav-inventory', data-testid='sale-submit-btn'
